utterances.speaker: Mona
utterances.text: How could you have kept all of this from me ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_How could you have kept all of this from me ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I was going to tell you , but

emotion_cause.span: 1_How could you have kept all of this from me ?

utterances.speaker: Dr. Green
utterances.text: But what ? ! You figured you would get what you wanted and then dump her like you dumped Rachel !

emotion_cause.span: 3_You figured you would get what you wanted and then dump her like you dumped Rachel !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey ! I did not dump Rachel ! Nor are we still together . Can I just ... Why do not we just let the machine get that ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey Ross . It is Joey . There is a hooker over here and we thought maybe you would know something about it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No ! No ! No ! No ! No ! I ... I ... I ... I ... I need to , I need to lie down .

emotion_cause.span: 5_There is a hooker over here and we thought maybe you would know something about it .
